resources.title: Documentation, support, and live platform access.
resources.description: Start with the live RMS platform, request a guided walkthrough, or contact our team for implementation help.

cards.title: Live RMS platform
cards.copy: Explore the production Forge RMS gateway, demo environment, and department portals.

cards.copy: Agency support, onboarding questions, and demo requests go straight to our team.

cards.title: Implementation
cards.copy: We help agencies configure modules, migrate data, and roll out by station or shift.
